response.overview: Prakash, a simple family man, hires young advocate Parimita to secure bail for his friend Samir, who is accused of murdering his wife Asha and seven-year-old son Tanmay. As Parimita digs deeper into the case, hidden secrets and unexpected suspects begin to emerge. Every clue reveals a new layer of deception, turning the investigation into a dangerous maze of lies, betrayal, and mystery. With the truth becoming harder to uncover, Parimita must risk everything to expose the real culprit before she herself becomes trapped in the deadly conspiracy.
response.title: Shikar
